code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut has = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if has
        nums = list.push(nums, sign * cur)
        cur = 0
        sign = 1
        has = false
      end
    else if b == 45 and not has
      sign = -1
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if has
  nums = list.push(nums, sign * cur)
end

mut result: List<Int> = []
mut is_first = true
mut prev = 0
for x in nums
  if is_first or x != prev
    result = list.push(result, x)
    is_first = false
    prev = x
  end
end

mut out = ""
mut first_out = true
for x in result
  if first_out
    out = "#{x}"
    first_out = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
end
println(out)
